creator: datahead4@gmail.com
text:
On Wed, Sep 15, 2010 at 4:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
>
> Maintainer of audio/liblastfm,
>
> Please note that PR ports/150605 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/150605
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

Previous PR numbers ports/139315 and ports/145062 attempted to correct
this problem with the same patch but a run through the QATty indicated
that the fix did not work.  I am not in a position to test if this is
still the case.

The proposed patch looks like it should solve the problem, but I
suggest a test run in QATty to verify the results.  Of the three
related PRs, I believe that ports/145062 has the best chance of fixing
this problem.
